blocks.content: I said I might come to one.
you said nobody ever made it feel like something you should see
I held the phone for a long time after that.

blocks.speaker: Ms. Barrett
blocks.content: I want you all to think about a moment where you knew something was about to change. Before it happened. That anticipation — that's what we're working with today.
I already knew what I was thinking about.

blocks.speaker: Ms. Barrett
blocks.content: Don't overthink it. Write what you felt, not what you knew. Those are different things.
Crystal was two rows over. I didn't look. I was learning not to look too fast.

blocks.prompt: Ms. Barrett says write what you felt. Crystal is two rows over.

options.label: Stay on the page. You're learning not to look too fast.
You look up at the same time she does. Both look away.
